# Bug Report

## Prerequisites

- [ ] I am sure that this problem has NEVER been discussed in [other issues](https://github.com/RuyiRepo/issues/issues).

## Summary

(Please describe the issue you are encountering concisely and clearly.)

## What you expected to happen

(Please describe the correct outcome you expect to see.)

## How to reproduce it

(How to reproduce this issue step by step. This step is crucial.)

## Relevant logs or screenshots

(Please paste any relevant logs or upload screenshots. You may use code blocks ``` for formatted output.)

## Environments

(Please specify the environment information, such as the operating system, architecture, package manager.)
